def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # 1. Sort by (code, date) for per-code rolling operations
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # 2. Cross-sectional rank of high
    rank_high = rank(pl.col('high')).over('date')

    # 3. Cross-sectional rank of volume
    rank_volume = rank(pl.col('volume')).over('date')

    # 4. Rolling 3-day correlation of the two ranks (per code, time-series)
    corr = rolling_corr(rank_high, rank_volume, window=3)

    # 5. Cross-sectional rank of the correlation
    rank_corr = rank(corr).over('date')

    # 6. Rolling 3-day sum of the rank (per code, time-series)
    sum_rank = rolling_sum(rank_corr, window=3)

    # 7. Negate
    factor = -1 * sum_rank

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
